CONTENT.Honours: Club AfricainTunisian Cup: 2016–17, 2017–18IndividualUNFP Ligue 2 Team of the Year: 2021–22, 2023–24
CONTENT.Club career: Abdi made his professional debut with JS Kairouan in a 0–0 Tunisian Ligue Professionnelle 1 tie with EGS Gafsa on 25 December 2011. On 24 June 2019, Abdi moved to Paris FC in the French Ligue 2.On 21 July 2021, he signed a two-year contract with Caen.
CONTENT.External links: Ali Abdi at SoccerwayParis FC Profile
CONTENT.Career statistics: As of 3 May 2024As of 9 June 2024Scores and results list Tunisia's goal tally first, score column indicates score after each Abdi goal.
CONTENT.International career: Abdi made his debut for the Tunisia national team on 25 March 2021 in an AFCON 2021 qualifier against Libya.

SUMMARY: Ali El Abdi (Arabic: علي العابدي; born 20 December 1993), known as Ali Abdi, is a Tunisian professional footballer who plays as a left-back for  Ligue 2 club Caen.
